headlines.title: U.S. pilots rescued after helicopter goes down near Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: A two-person U.S. military crew was rescued after their helicopter went down near the Strait of Hormuz. The cause of the incident remains unknown. President Trump told reporters that “the pilots are fine,” and that no one was injured in the incident.

headlines.title: Graham Platner Faces Key Test in Maine Primary
headlines.description: All eyes are on a key U.S. Senate race in Maine, where democratic senate hopeful Graham Platner, who has weathered a series of scandals, is likely to win a chance to unseat longtime Maine Senator Susan Collins in the general election. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: 2020 election denier under scrutiny from fair elections advocates for new role at DOJ
headlines.description: An election denier who tried to overturn Donald Trump’s 2020 election loss is facing scrutiny over his new role in the Justice Department as part of a team investigating the president’s foes.

headlines.title: Nithya Raman advances over Spencer Pratt to face L.A. Mayor Karen Bass in a runoff
headlines.description: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass will face City Council member Nithya Raman in a runoff election for Bass’ job in November, NBC News projects, teeing up a one-on-one matchup between two Democrats

headlines.title: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs send boisterous Knicks fans home quiet with Game 3 win
headlines.description: New York Knicks fans rained vulgarities down on Victor Wembanayma and his teammates inside Madison Square Garden but the San Antonio Spurs responded with their best game of the NBA Finals.

headlines.title: Plenty of star power on celebrity row for Knicks-Spurs Game 3
headlines.description: Forget the sky. Plenty of bold-faced names are expected Monday night on Celebrity Row and throughout the crowd at Game 3 of the NBA Finals.

headlines.title: How New Yorkers celebrated the Knicks’ first NBA Finals appearance in 27 years
headlines.description: Fans paid thousands of dollars to see the New York Knicks at Madison Square Garden and flooded Bryant Park for an outdoor watch party for the team’s first NBA Finals appearance since 1999.

headlines.title: Trump booed at Madison Square Garden for Game 3 of NBA Finals
headlines.description: President Donald Trump attended Madison Square Garden for Game 3 of the NBA Finals on Monday to cheer on his hometown team — but many of his fellow fans didn’t appear thrilled to have him there.

headlines.title: Nick Reiner seeks access to trust fund his parents left to pay for his defense in their killings
headlines.description: Rob and Michele Reiner’s son is seeking access to his more than $1.5 million trust fund to help pay for his defense against charges in their double homicide.

headlines.title: Inside Google’s AI training for teachers
headlines.description: Google flew 70 teachers and administrators to its California headquarters to learn about its AI products — and how to persuade skeptical colleagues to use them.

headlines.title: Adults should have no more than one drink a day, a team of scientists says
headlines.description: Americans should limit their alcohol consumption to no more than one drink per day, according to a study published Tuesday in the Journal of Studies on Alcohol and Drugs

headlines.title: Second-Hand Stores Thrive as Affordability Becomes Top Priority
headlines.description: Buying and selling second-hand goods at thrift stores and online marketplaces like Depop are seeing a resurgence led by young shoppers hunting for a bargain. It comes as many Americans struggle to afford the basics with inflation at a three-year high and prices rising faster than wages for the first time since 2023. NBC’s Christine Romans reports for TODAY.
